title: ChatStreamDataType::Unknown is outbound but remains a unit variant — cannot preserve original wire string
description: ChatStreamDataType is used in ChatStreamEnable which the client constructs and sends over WebSocket. It kept the old #[serde(other)] unit Unknown pattern while ChatKind/ChatMemberRole/OwnerPresence were converted to Unknown(String). If a future spec adds a stream data type and a server echoes a ChatStreamEnable back, deserializing and re-sending would lose the original wire string (serializes as literal 'unknown'). Consistent fix: convert to Unknown(String) with the same manual serde pattern as the other three.
